body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: yes
irrlicht_observes: yes

## Reasoning

`basic-turn` is the smallest possible round-trip: one user message, one assistant reply, no tool use, asserting the `ready -> working -> ready` arc with `TotalTokens > 0` after the turn. Its primitive is transcript turn-end detection and it requires `headless_mode`.

**agent_supports: yes.** Codex CLI 0.130.0 runs a single prompt non-interactively via its `exec` headless mode, which is recorded in the codex adapter's `capabilities.json` as `headless_mode: true` and `structured_output_jsonl: true`. The committed codex regression fixture `regression/baseline-hello` is itself a captured headless single-turn round-trip, demonstrating the agent completes a basic turn and writes the JSONL transcript the daemon tails.

**irrlicht_observes: yes.** The codex adapter watches session transcripts via `FilesUnderRoot{Dir: sessionsDir(), Parser: JSONLineParser{...}}` (agent.go) and the JSONL `Parser` (parser.go) translates the `task_complete` event_msg into an `EventType: "turn_done"`, so `IsAgentDone()` fires through the primary path and drives the `working -> ready` transition. The same parser extracts per-turn and cumulative token usage from `token_count` events (`last_token_usage` / `total_token_usage`), yielding the non-zero `TotalTokens` the spec asserts. Parser unit tests `TestParser_FullTranscript_EndDetection`, `TestParser_TurnCompleteEmitsTurnDone`, and `TestParser_MultiTurnTokenCount_UsesPerTurnSnapshot` cover exactly this turn-end + token-accounting behavior. The existing coverage matrix already records codex/basic-turn as yes/yes; this assessment ratifies it.

No carve-outs apply: codex assigns turn boundaries cleanly via `task_complete` (unlike aider, whose idle-flush turn-end carries ~5s latency and is recorded as a `partial` in the matrix).

sources.note: FilesUnderRoot + JSONLineParser transport; ExactName process match
task_complete -> turn_done so IsAgentDone fires; token usage extraction from token_count events
headless_mode: true, structured_output_jsonl: true, cost_tracking: true
committed captured headless single-turn round-trip fixture
